<!-- Thank you for contributing to Qadamha! -->

## What kind of change is this?

- [ ] New story
- [ ] Translation of an existing story
- [ ] Correction / update to a story
- [ ] Code / site change

## For story PRs

- [ ] The file is in the right language folder (`en/`, `fa/`, `ps/`) and named `lowercase-with-dashes.md`
- [ ] Translations use the **same file name** as the original
- [ ] The story is written with respect for the people involved
- [ ] Sources are linked where they exist
- [ ] If this is a first-hand account, that is said in the text
- [ ] `draft: false` is set (the story is ready to publish)

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything the maintainer should know — e.g. you are the founder, or how you verified the facts. -->
